prompt: Create a dramatic anime-style illustration in a bright outdoor plaza in front of a modern white university or civic building under a vivid blue sky with scattered clouds. At the very top, place one huge italic headline reading Let’s make up! in white letters with a thick navy outline. On the building facade, include two visible blue signboards: a large upper sign reading AI広場 with the smaller line “みんなのAI、みんなの未来。” beneath it, and a darker lower digital screen reading “未来を創るのは、私たちだ。” above a glowing network globe marked “AI”. In the foreground, show exactly two young adult men in profile facing each other at very close range: the left man has short swept-back light brown hair, wears a black jacket over a dark shirt, and reaches both hands toward the other man’s face; the right man has messy dark brown hair, wears a dark green long-sleeve shirt, and reaches both hands toward the left man’s face. Their hands are pressed to each other’s cheeks as if applying makeup or making peace in a tense but humorous public demonstration. Both main faces are intentionally covered by large soft rectangular skin-tone privacy blurs, and several background onlookers also have smaller blurred faces. Behind them, include a crowd of office workers and students in suits and casual clothing, some holding smartphones, watching the scene in front of the AI plaza. Use polished Japanese anime rendering, sharp linework, cinematic composition, expressive hand anatomy, dynamic close-up perspective, saturated daylight colors, and detailed building architecture.
